untranslatable_reason: Point-and-figure pattern analysis requires: (1) identification of base/top formations with specific price levels (Pb, Py) and column widths (W), (2) reversal parameter (Rk) calculation, and (3) manual chart pattern detection. These are chart-based pattern recognition tasks that cannot be expressed using the available OHLCV and technical indicators. The signal requires manual identification of formation structures, lowest/highest points within those structures, and column counting on P&F charts—operations outside the scope of quantitative indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_5 is a point-and-figure charting methodology signal. It requires: identifying base formations (lowest point Pb, width W in columns) or top formations (highest box Py, width W), then calculating objectives using Au = Pb + (W × Rk) or Ap = Py - (W × Rk). This is pattern recognition on P&F charts, not indicator-based trading. No allowed indicators can detect or measure column widths, box reversals, or formation structures. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT suggest reversal-based exit but without explicit thresholds or formation-level definitions, cannot be reliably codified. Recommend: manual implementation or custom pattern detection module.
